name: QQ浏览器自动化
examples_zh: 打开搜狗搜索今天北京天气，把搜索结果第一条的天气信息告诉我
在这个登录页面填写用户名和密码，提交前先让我确认
访问这个商品页，截图并告诉我价格和评分
examples_en: Open Sogou and search for Beijing weather today, tell me the weather info from the first result
Fill in the username and password on this login page, let me confirm before submitting
Visit this product page, take a screenshot and tell me the price and rating
